from __future__ import annotations


def parse_request(raw: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    key, value = raw.split("=", 1)
    return {key: value}


def validate_request(data: dict[str, str]) -> None:
    if "id" not in data:
        raise ValueError("missing id")


def monolithic_module_owns_parsing_validation_execution_and_rendering_negative(raw: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    data = parse_request(raw)
    validate_request(data)
    return data
